arts.ttl: Barcelona set to seal third contract renewal this week after Pedri and Gavi agreements
arts.sum: Over the last couple of weeks, Barcelona have been very busy in renewing contracts, and soon, more agreements will be made official. Ronald Araujo and Gerard Martin have already signed new deals in the last seven days, and as many of three of their teammates are also expected to also commit their futures. arts.ttl: David Beckham Admits Lionel Messi Will Return to Barcelona
arts.sum: As much as the Manchester United legend and Inter Miami co-owner wants Messi to stay in Miami, a return to Barcelona seems inevitable.

arts.ttl: Barcelona to partner with Ed Sheeran for next Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are expected to partner up with musician Ed Sheeran for the upcoming edition of El Clásico. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who have on Tuesday provided…

Lionel Messi wants to re-join Barcelona when his time at Inter Miami draws to a close, according to sensational reports in Spain. Messi has less than 12 months remaining on his current Inter Miami deal and Spanish outlet Relevo claim that he will push to re-join Barcelona due to his love for the club and the city.

arts.ttl: Saudi Arabian giants reach deal with Barcelona for 19-year-old talent
arts.sum: Barcelona have reached an agreement with Al-Ittihad for teenage talent Unai Hernandez. The deal will see the captain of their Barca Atletic side and one of their most talented youngsters leave the club for Saudi Arabia. According to Fabrizio Romano, the deal will be worth €4.5m to Barcelona, with a potential €0.5m further in add-ons […] The post Saudi Arabian giants reach deal with Barcelona for 19-year-old talent appeared first on Football España.
